steps.title: Translate the length-height relationship
steps.content: The problem states the unit's length is 3 times its height. Since $x$ represents length and $y$ represents height, this translates to $x = 3y$. Systems that use $y = 3x$ reverse the relationship, making height 3 times length instead.

steps.title: Translate the height value and identify the system
steps.content: The problem states the height of a certain storage unit is 84 inches. Since $y$ represents height, this gives us $y = 84$. The system of equations must contain both $x = 3y$ and $y = 84$. That matches the correct answer; B is correct.
